scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run server" "wait-on -t 60000 http-get://127.0.0.1:5125/api/health && npm run web:dev"
scripts.server:kill: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5125 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue|Select -First 1;if($c){Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force;Write-Host 'Port 5125 freed.'}else{Write-Host 'Port 5125 is free.'}"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run server
